purpose: Primary Jh profile configuration for data extraction and presentation

8825_projects.description: Personal innovation lab and system development

profile_title.primary: Industrial Designer / UX Strategist / Design Leader
profile_title.story: From mastering physical product design to leading strategic innovation across digital and physical domains

characteristics: Grounded in craft, elevated by strategy
Leadership through doing, not just directing

writing_style.sentence_structure: Clear and purposeful - every word earns its place
writing_style.technical_depth: Deep craft knowledge translated to strategic insight
writing_style.personality: Confident without arrogance - work speaks for itself
writing_style.humor: Rare - let the work be impressive

narrative_voice.opening: Lead with craft mastery and tangible outcomes
narrative_voice.body: Show progression from making to leading through concrete examples
narrative_voice.emphasis: What was built, what changed, who it helped
narrative_voice.proof: Revenue, market position, industry firsts, teams led

avoid: Buzzwords that don't reflect actual work

summary.focus: Industrial designer who evolved into strategic design leader - craft mastery enables innovation leadership
summary.opening_line: Lead with craft foundation and measurable impact
key_themes: 20+ years mastering physical product design (eyewear, watches, sports equipment)
Pioneered industry-first innovations (VSP Innovation Lab, 3D prototyping)
Strategic evolution into UX and digital systems
Leadership through building - founded departments, led teams, shipped products
Recent: Applying craft + strategy to AI-powered tools
summary.narrative_structure: Craft mastery → Strategic thinking → Leadership impact

work_experience.emphasis: What you built, what changed, measurable impact
work_experience.structure: Lead with outcome → Show craft/strategy → Prove with metrics

framing.early_career: Craft mastery - building products, pioneering processes
framing.mid_career: Strategic application - leading teams, driving revenue
framing.recent: Leadership + innovation - founding systems, enabling others

highlight_progression: Marchon (2004-2012): Founded VSP Innovation Lab, pioneered 3D prototyping, $10M Nike Vision
Fossil (2012-2015): Senior designer to strategic contributor, 23.7% sales increase
COSTA (2016-2018): Design Lead, user research to product strategy
PRTCL (2018-2024): Managing Partner, led agency, luxury collaborations
Hammer (2015-Now): Product Manager, UX strategy, automation systems

projects.selection_criteria: Projects that show craft → strategy → leadership evolution

craft_foundation: VSP Innovation Lab - Pioneered 3D prototyping in eyewear
Nike Vision Live Free - $10M revenue, #1 global product
Amare Stoudemire Goggles - User-centered industrial design
strategic_evolution: COSTA Performance Eyewear - User research to product strategy
Shinola Collaborations - Luxury brand strategy across categories

projects.framing: Each project reinforces: maker → strategist → leader

skills.presentation: Demonstrated through work experience and projects, not abstract claims

section_narratives.summary: Industrial designer evolved into strategic design leader through 20+ years of craft mastery, innovation, and team leadership
section_narratives.work_experience: Progression from craft mastery (Marchon/VSP Lab) → strategic impact (Fossil/COSTA) → leadership (PRTCL/Hammer) → innovation (8825/Trustybits)
section_narratives.key_projects: Showcase evolution: Physical products → User-centered design → Digital systems → AI-powered tools
section_narratives.skills: Deep craft foundation enables strategic thinking and leadership effectiveness
section_narratives.education: Continuous learning from industrial design roots to AI applications
section_narratives.awards: Industry recognition of innovation and impact

visual_style.emphasis: Bold for key achievements, italics for context

continuous_learning.adaptation: Profile evolves with experience and focus shifts

jh_comms.use: Extract communication style and relationship patterns
jh_comms.apply: Inform tone and voice in profile

narrative_framework.core_story: Industrial Designer / UX Strategist / Design Leader

act_1.title: Craft Mastery (2004-2015)
act_1.narrative: Built foundation through deep industrial design expertise
key_moments: Founded VSP Innovation Lab - pioneered 3D prototyping in eyewear industry
Nike Vision Live Free - $10M revenue, #1 global product
Mastered materials, manufacturing, and product development across eyewear, watches, sports equipment
act_1.theme: Excellence through craft - making things that matter

act_2.title: Strategic Evolution (2015-2020)
act_2.narrative: Applied craft mastery to strategic thinking and user-centered design
key_moments: COSTA Design Lead - translated user research into product strategy
PRTCL Managing Partner - led design agency, luxury collaborations
Hammer Product Manager - UX strategy, automation, measurable outcomes
act_2.theme: From making to leading - craft enables strategy

act_3.title: Innovation Leadership (2020-Present)
act_3.narrative: Leading innovation across physical and digital domains
key_moments: Applying 20+ years of craft + strategy to AI-powered tools
act_3.theme: Leadership through building - enabling others to innovate

reinforcing_themes.leadership_through_doing: Led by example, founded departments, shipped products
reinforcing_themes.physical_to_digital: Bridging tangible craft with digital systems

executive_summary.narrative: Industrial designer who evolved into strategic design leader - 20+ years of measurable impact

technical_profile.narrative: Deep craft mastery enables technical innovation - from 3D prototyping to AI systems

collaboration_profile.narrative: Leadership through building - founded departments, led teams, enabled others

innovation_profile.narrative: Pioneer in physical products, now applying craft + strategy to AI-powered tools

thought_leadership.focus: Unique perspective from craft → strategy → leadership journey
thought_leadership.narrative: How deep craft mastery enables innovation leadership across physical and digital domains
